task_objective: Center visual components and fix missing values alignment
design_decisions: Centered CorrelationMatrixComponent and Correlation type buttons using Flexbox utility classes.
Refactored the Missing Count Chart to use a single Flex container where each bar and its label are wrapped together, ensuring perfect vertical alignment regardless of label length.
Improved missing chart label rotation and positioning for better readability.
Added a dashed background line to each column in the Nullity Matrix SVG to show the dataset structure even when columns are 100% missing.
Randomized missing value injection in the test script to prevent 'head-only' sampling bias in the Missing Matrix.
results: Visual components are now centered, and the missing values visualizations correctly represent the dataset distribution.
